name: Crockpot Budget Beef Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 1/4-inch strips and season with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned steak in the bottom of a crockpot, along with the onion.
3. In a small bowl, mix together garlic salt, Worcestershire sauce, beef bouillon, and catsup.
4. Pour the mixture over the meat in the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours or until tender.
6. Turn the control to high. Add wine and mushrooms to the pot.
7. Dissolve flour in a small amount of water to make a slurry, then stir into the meat mixture until well combined.
8. Cook on high for 15 minutes or until slightly thickened.
9. Stir in sour cream; turn off heat.
10. Serve with rice or noodles.
